LanguageData.APM_ToxicPurifier_LevelToAffectRelation: Toxicity in the atmosphere in local area has reach the critical point of {0} that would affect the globe, relations with other faction will deteriorate.
LanguageData.APM_ToxicPurifier_LevelToStartSpreading: Toxicity in the atmosphere in local area has reach the critical point of {0} that would affect nearby tiles.
LanguageData.APM_ToxicPurifier_LevelToAffectRelationA: Toxicity in the atmosphere in local area has reach the critical point of {0} which would affect nearby tiles and critical point of {1} which would affect faction relations.
